themes.name: default
themes.description: Balanced cool neutrals with an indigo accent.

themes.name: claw
themes.description: Anthropic-inspired warm ivory and Claude-chat greys.

themes.name: void
themes.description: Monochrome, borderless surfaces from white to true black.

pieces.name: accordion
pieces.description: Config-first WAI-ARIA accordion group over Collapsible's speed-based open/close animation, single or multiple open

pieces.name: alert
pieces.description: Inline callout with default/brand/danger variants, leading icon, and optional title

pieces.name: alert-dialog
pieces.description: Confirm/cancel modal for destructive or consequential actions on the native <dialog role="alertdialog"> element — no backdrop dismiss, no close X, Escape cancels, initial focus on Cancel

pieces.name: area-chart
pieces.description: Responsive, config-first area chart with overlapping or stacked bands, full-strength edge lines, a nearest-x hover crosshair, tooltip, legend, and an sr-only data table

pieces.name: aspect-ratio
pieces.description: Fixed width:height ratio box that constrains slotted media or content to a chosen aspect

pieces.name: avatar
pieces.description: Image avatar with initials fallback on a deterministic color, or a neutral person glyph

pieces.name: avatar-group
pieces.description: Overlapping stack of avatars from an array, with a +N overflow chip past a max count

pieces.name: badge
pieces.description: Status chip with default/brand/danger/outline variants

pieces.name: bar-chart
pieces.description: Config-first categorical bar chart — single, grouped, or stacked series with a legend, per-bar hover tooltips, responsive width, and an sr-only data table

pieces.name: breadcrumb
pieces.description: Config-first breadcrumb trail rendered from an items array, with a chevron separator and the final crumb as aria-current page text

pieces.name: button
pieces.description: Button with primary/secondary/outline/ghost/destructive variants, three sizes, and a loading state

pieces.name: button-group
pieces.description: Joined row of action buttons — segmented toolbar cluster from an items array with icons, outline/secondary variants, and three sizes

pieces.name: calendar
pieces.description: Inline month-grid calendar with days/months/years drill-down, full keyboard nav, min/max + disabledDates, locale-aware labels via Intl, and an opt-in display-only range/preview shading overlay

pieces.name: card
pieces.description: Presentational container with optional title/description header, default body slot, and a footer slot for actions

pieces.name: carousel
pieces.description: Accessible scroll-snap carousel — arrows, dots, keyboard, autoplay; slides are slot children

pieces.name: chat-attachment
pieces.description: File attachment chip — type-inferred icon, truncated filename, size caption, optional download link and removable mode

pieces.name: chat-message
pieces.description: Chat message row — avatar with initials fallback, author/time meta, sent/received bubble variants, start/end alignment, compact follow-up mode, and an attachments slot

pieces.name: chat-scroller
pieces.description: Stick-to-bottom chat viewport — role=log region that follows new content while pinned, with a jump-to-latest pill once the reader scrolls up

pieces.name: checkbox
pieces.description: Checkbox built on a native input, with optional label and hint, click-anywhere label wrapper, and a change callback

pieces.name: code
pieces.description: Code panel with syntax highlighting (highlight.js, GitHub light/dark palette, Puzzle template grammar), optional line-number gutter, copy button, and a collapsible View Code preview that animates open

pieces.name: collapsible
pieces.description: Animated disclosure with speed-based duration and inert/aria-hidden discipline

pieces.name: combobox
pieces.description: Filterable autocomplete combobox — role=combobox input over a listbox popup with ranked filtering, groups, optional-controlled open, and aria-activedescendant keyboard nav

pieces.name: command
pieces.description: Command palette — filtered, grouped, keyboard-driven quick actions in a modal

pieces.name: context-menu
pieces.description: Right-click context menu — dropdown-menu's grouped items, danger rows, and keyboard nav opened at the pointer position with viewport clamping

pieces.name: copy-button
pieces.description: Click-to-copy button — writes a value to the clipboard and shows a transient copied state (check icon, swapped label/aria-label, aria-live announcement) before reverting

pieces.name: data-table
pieces.description: Interactive data table over the presentational Table conventions — optional-controlled column sorting, row selection with select-all, and built-in pagination via the Pagination piece

pieces.name: date-picker
pieces.description: Field-shaped trigger + popover composing Calendar: controlled ISO value, optional-controlled open, label/hint/error, locale-aware trigger label, auto-flip, and optional trigger↔panel morph

pieces.name: date-range-picker
pieces.description: Start/end range selection in a field-shaped trigger + popover composing Calendar: controlled {start,end} ISO value, in-between range + hover-preview shading, optional-controlled open, one or two months, and optional presets

pieces.name: description-list
pieces.description: Semantic key-value description list (<dl>/<dt>/<dd>) rendered from an items array, for detail panels, summaries, and spec sheets — stacked or inline two-column layout, optional row dividers, two sizes

pieces.name: dialog
pieces.description: Modal dialog on the native <dialog> element — focus trapping, escape/backdrop dismiss, title/description ARIA wiring, footer slot

pieces.name: dropdown-menu
pieces.description: Click-toggle dropdown menu with grouped items, dividers, danger items, keyboard nav, and outside-click dismiss

pieces.name: dropzone
pieces.description: File upload dropzone — drag-drop + click-to-browse over a hidden file input, dragover styling, removable file list, and accept/size validation

pieces.name: emoji-picker
pieces.description: Emoji picker popover — searchable, keyboard-navigable grid of the full Unicode emoji set grouped by category, with slot trigger, optional-controlled open, auto-flip, and optional trigger↔panel morph

pieces.name: emoji-picker-simple
pieces.description: Lightweight emoji picker popover — bottom category tabs instead of search (skips the keyword data file), one category rendered at a time, keyboard grid nav, optional-controlled open, and optional morph

pieces.name: empty
pieces.description: Empty-state block for no-results moments — optional icon slot, title, description, and action slot in a centered muted column

pieces.name: field
pieces.description: Labeled text input with hint/error helper text, danger invalid state, and full ARIA wiring

pieces.name: hover-card
pieces.description: Hover/focus-triggered floating card for link previews and user cards — open/close delays, hover-persistent panel, auto-flip placement, optional-controlled open

pieces.name: input-group
pieces.description: Field-compatible input with fused prefix/suffix addon slots — group-level focus ring and error styling, full label/hint/error ARIA

pieces.name: input-otp
pieces.description: Segmented one-time-code input — single-char cells with paste distribution, backspace/arrow navigation, numeric or alphanumeric charsets, optional group separators, and change/complete callbacks

pieces.name: kanban
pieces.description: Config-first controlled Kanban board — horizontal columns of draggable cards with pointer drag-and-drop, an insertion-placeholder indicator, full keyboard move (pick up, arrow-move between/within columns, drop), aria-live announcements, and a value-first @move intent the parent applies

pieces.name: kbd
pieces.description: Keyboard-key hint rendered in a native <kbd> with a keycap shadow

pieces.name: label
pieces.description: Accessible <label> for a form control, with a `for` target and slot content

pieces.name: line-chart
pieces.description: Responsive, config-first multi-series line chart with a nearest-x hover crosshair, tooltip, legend, and an sr-only data table

pieces.name: marquee
pieces.description: Continuously scrolling ticker of slot content — seamless rAF loop with pause-on-hover, drag-to-scroll, direction and speed props, and prefers-reduced-motion respect

pieces.name: masonry
pieces.description: Responsive CSS-columns masonry/gallery grid — slot children flow into a responsive column count with a gap prop

pieces.name: menubar
pieces.description: Desktop-app-style horizontal menu bar — top labels open dropdowns with keyboard-shortcut hints, separators, disabled and danger items, hover-switching, and full menubar keyboard nav

pieces.name: meter
pieces.description: Semantic gauge (role=meter) showing a value within low/optimum/high bands with sentiment color, a label, and a formatted value

pieces.name: multi-select
pieces.description: A filterable tag / multi-value combobox: picks show as removable chips, typing filters the rest

pieces.name: navigation-menu
pieces.description: Horizontal site navigation with hover/click flyout panels of link cards — disclosure-pattern semantics, delayed hover intent, viewport-clamped panels, active-route underline

pieces.name: number-field
pieces.description: Accessible numeric form field with min/max/step, increment/decrement buttons, arrow/PageUp-Down keyboard, precision formatting, and label/hint/error

pieces.name: pagination
pieces.description: Controlled page navigator — windowed page numbers with first/last, ellipses, and disabled-at-the-ends prev/next icon buttons

pieces.name: panel-stack
pieces.description: Controlled nested-panel navigation stack with delegated push/pop actions, fluid slide or stack transitions, Escape composition, and focus restoration

pieces.name: password-field
pieces.description: Password input with an in-input show/hide visibility toggle and hint/error state

pieces.name: pie-chart
pieces.description: Config-first part-to-whole donut/pie — fixed slot colors, always-on legend, per-slice hover tooltips with percent, optional donut-center total, 8-slice folding, and an sr-only data table

pieces.name: popconfirm
pieces.description: Inline confirmation popover anchored to a trigger — message, optional description, confirm/cancel actions, danger variant, auto-flip placement, optional-controlled open

pieces.name: popover
pieces.description: Click-toggled floating panel with slot trigger, auto-flip, and outside-click dismiss

pieces.name: progress
pieces.description: Determinate or indeterminate progress bar with optional label and percentage, in two sizes

pieces.name: progress-ring
pieces.description: Determinate circular progress ring — SVG dashoffset sweep from 12 o'clock with centered percentage, sized and tinted via tokens

pieces.name: quantity-input
pieces.description: E-commerce stepper: decrement/increment buttons around a number input, always clamped to [min, max]

pieces.name: radio-group
pieces.description: Config-first radio group rendered from an options array, with native arrow-key nav, per-option hints/disabled, and vertical or horizontal layout

pieces.name: rating
pieces.description: Star rating — read-only display with half-star support and an interactive radiogroup input mode with keyboard nav and hover preview

pieces.name: scroll-area
pieces.description: Overlay-scrollbar wrapper — native scrolling with a fading, draggable custom thumb in vertical, horizontal, or both orientations

pieces.name: search-field
pieces.description: Search input with a leading magnifier icon and a trailing clear button; submits on Enter

pieces.name: select
pieces.description: Listbox-pattern select with typeahead, keyboard nav, group labels, dividers, and optional trigger↔panel morph

pieces.name: separator
pieces.description: Hairline divider in horizontal or vertical orientation

pieces.name: sheet
pieces.description: Bottom sheet with drag-to-dismiss physics; becomes a centered modal on wide viewports

pieces.name: sidebar
pieces.description: Config-first app-shell navigation rail — grouped links with icons and badges, animated collapsible submenus, active-route highlighting, and an optional-controlled collapsed icon-only mode with header/footer slots

pieces.name: skeleton
pieces.description: Pulsing loading placeholder with text/circle/block shapes

pieces.name: slider
pieces.description: Touch-friendly single-value or dual-thumb range slider with gesture arming, keyboard support, and optional form inputs

pieces.name: sparkline
pieces.description: Tiny inline trend line — no axes, grid, or tooltip; color inherits from the text token, with an optional soft area fill

pieces.name: spinner
pieces.description: Inline rotating-ring loading indicator

pieces.name: split-button
pieces.description: Primary action button fused to a dropdown caret that opens a menu of secondary actions — the classic Save ▾ pattern, with Button's variants/sizes and value-first @press/@select callbacks

pieces.name: split-panel
pieces.description: Resizable two-pane layout with horizontal or vertical direction, constraints, snap points, nesting, keyboard controls, and persistence

pieces.name: stat-card
pieces.description: KPI tile: label, preformatted value, optional signed delta with sentiment coloring, and an optional trend Sparkline

pieces.name: stepper
pieces.description: Numbered step-progress indicator — horizontal or vertical, complete/current/upcoming states, optional clickable steps

pieces.name: switch
pieces.description: Toggle switch on a native checkbox with role=switch, optional label and hint

pieces.name: table
pieces.description: Config-first styled semantic table rendered from a columns schema and an array of row objects, with per-column alignment, an optional caption, and an empty state — the presentational tier, not a data grid (no sorting, selection, or virtualization)

pieces.name: tabs
pieces.description: Accessible tablist — underline or pill variant; panels stay parent-owned

pieces.name: tags-input
pieces.description: Free-text tag entry — type + Enter to add, Backspace to remove, each tag removable; controlled string-array value (no predefined options)

pieces.name: textarea
pieces.description: Labeled multi-line text input with hint/error and ARIA wiring, mirroring Field

pieces.name: time-picker
pieces.description: Field-shaped trigger + popover with hour/minute/second listbox columns and 12/24h display: controlled HH:MM value, optional-controlled open, label/hint/error, locale-aware trigger label

pieces.name: timeline
pieces.description: Vertical event timeline from an items array — dot/connector rail with per-item title, time, description, optional status color, and optional icon or step-number markers

pieces.name: toast
pieces.description: Imperative toast() API with a Toaster host — variants, pausable auto-dismiss, corner positioning

pieces.name: toggle
pieces.description: Two-state pressed button (aria-pressed) for tool states, with default/outline variants and three sizes

pieces.name: toggle-group
pieces.description: Config-first joined row of pressed-state buttons (single or multiple select) with a11y group semantics

pieces.name: toolbar
pieces.description: Horizontal or vertical grouped controls container with role=toolbar and roving-tabindex arrow-key navigation across buttons, toggles, and separators

pieces.name: tooltip
pieces.description: Hover/focus text hint with delay and four placements

pieces.name: tree
pieces.description: Config-first WAI-ARIA tree view — nested nodes with expand/collapse, roving-tabindex keyboard nav, and a selection callback
